structured_payload_candidate.title: Primary Only Condensing Boiler Staging Up
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Stage up if availability condition, or efficiency condition (Qrequired > 200% of B-STAGE MIN of next stage for 10 min and flow > min flow setpoint), or failsafe (HW supply 10°F < setpoint for 15 min).
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Any of: 1) Equipment unavailable; 2) Qrequired > 200% of B-STAGE MIN of next available stage for 10 minutes AND hot water flowrate > minimum flow setpoint of next stage; 3) HW supply temperature 10°F < setpoint for 15 minutes.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Stage up to next available stage.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Stage up if any of the following is true: 1. Availability Condition: ... 2. Efficiency Condition: Both of the following are true: i. Qrequired exceeds 200% of B-STAGE MIN of the next available stage for 10 minutes ii. Hot water flowrate exceeds the minimum flow setpoint of the next available stage (see Section 5.21.8). 3. Failsafe Condition: HW supply temperature is 10°F < setpoint for 15 minutes.

evidence_quote: Stage up if any of the following is true: 1. Availability Condition: ... 2. Efficiency Condition: Both of the following are true: i. Qrequired exceeds 200% of B-STAGE MIN of the next available stage for 10 minutes ii. Hot water flowrate exceeds the minimum flow setpoint of the next available stage (see Section 5.21.8). 3. Failsafe Condition: HW supply temperature is 10°F < setpoint for 15 minutes.
rejection_reason: evidence_quote not verbatim in any chunk

structured_payload_candidate.title: Variable Primary/Variable Secondary Condensing Boiler Staging Up
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Variable primary/variable secondary condensing boiler plants
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Stage up if availability condition, or efficiency condition (Qrequired > 150% of B-STAGE MIN of next stage for 10 min and primary flow > min flow setpoint), or failsafe (HW supply 10°F < setpoint for 15 min).
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Any of: 1) Equipment unavailable; 2) Qrequired > 150% of B-STAGE MIN of next available stage for 10 minutes AND primary hot water flowrate > minimum flow setpoint of next stage; 3) HW supply temperature 10°F < setpoint for 15 minutes.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Stage up to next available stage.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Stage up if any of the following is true: 1. Availability Condition: ... 2. Efficiency Condition: Both of the following are true: i. Qrequired exceeds 150% of B-STAGE MIN of the next available stage for 10 minutes ii. Primary hot water flowrate exceeds the minimum flow setpoint of the next available stage (see Section 5.21.8). 3. Failsafe Condition: HW supply temperature is 10°F < setpoint for 15 minutes.

evidence_quote: Stage up if any of the following is true: 1. Availability Condition: ... 2. Efficiency Condition: Both of the following are true: i. Qrequired exceeds 150% of B-STAGE MIN of the next available stage for 10 minutes ii. Primary hot water flowrate exceeds the minimum flow setpoint of the next available stage (see Section 5.21.8). 3. Failsafe Condition: HW supply temperature is 10°F < setpoint for 15 minutes.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Non-Condensing Boiler Staging Up
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Stage up if availability condition, or efficiency condition (Qrequired > 90% of design capacity of current stage for 10 min), or failsafe (HW supply 10°F < setpoint for 15 min).
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Any of: 1) Equipment unavailable; 2) Qrequired > 90% of design capacity of boilers in current stage for 10 minutes; 3) HW supply temperature 10°F < setpoint for 15 minutes.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Stage up to next available stage.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Stage up if any of the following is true: 1. Availability Condition: ... 2. Efficiency Condition: Qrequired exceeds 90% of the design capacity, QbX, of the boilers in the current stage for 10 minutes; or 3. Failsafe Condition: HW supply temperature is 10°F < setpoint for 15 minutes.

evidence_quote: Stage up if any of the following is true: 1. Availability Condition: ... 2. Efficiency Condition: Qrequired exceeds 90% of the design capacity, QbX, of the boilers in the current stage for 10 minutes; or 3. Failsafe Condition: HW supply temperature is 10°F < setpoint for 15 minutes.
rejection_reason: evidence_quote not verbatim in any chunk

structured_payload_candidate.title: Hybrid Boiler Staging Up (Condensing Next Stage)
structured_payload_candidate.summary: If all boilers in next higher stage are condensing, stage up using same conditions as variable primary/variable secondary condensing: availability, efficiency (Qrequired > 150% of B-STAGE MIN for 10 min and flow > min flow setpoint), or failsafe.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Same as 5.21.3.9.h: availability, or (Qrequired > 150% of B-STAGE MIN of next stage for 10 min AND primary flow > min flow setpoint), or HW supply 10°F < setpoint for 15 min.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Stage up to next available stage.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: If all boilers enabled in the next higher stage are condensing, stage up if any of the following is true: 1. Availability Condition: ... 2. Efficiency Condition: Both of the following are true: i. Qrequired exceeds 150% of B-STAGE MIN of the next available stage for 10 minutes ii. Primary hot water flowrate exceeds the minimum flow setpoint of the next available stage (see Section 5.21.8). 3. Failsafe Condition: HW supply temperature is 10°F < setpoint for 15 minutes.

evidence_quote: If all boilers enabled in the next higher stage are condensing, stage up if any of the following is true: 1. Availability Condition: ... 2. Efficiency Condition: Both of the following are true: i. Qrequired exceeds 150% of B-STAGE MIN of the next available stage for 10 minutes ii. Primary hot water flowrate exceeds the minimum flow setpoint of the next available stage (see Section 5.21.8). 3. Failsafe Condition: HW supply temperature is 10°F < setpoint for 15 minutes.
rejection_reason: evidence_quote not verbatim in any chunk

evidence_quote: If any boiler enabled in the next higher stage is non-condensing, stage up if any of the following is true: 1. Availability Condition: ... 2.
